evaluation_summary.actors: All actors are explicitly mentioned in the documentation and their capabilities are accurately reflected. No hallucinated or missing entries.
evaluation_summary.assets: All assets are explicitly mentioned in the documentation.  No hallucinated or missing entries.
evaluation_summary.components: All components are explicitly mentioned in the documentation. No hallucinated or missing entries.
evaluation_summary.data_flows: Data flows are mostly accurate but lack detailed descriptions of the data exchanged. Some flows might be implicit rather than explicitly stated.
evaluation_summary.trust_boundaries: Trust boundaries are well-defined and align with the system architecture. No hallucinated or missing entries.
evaluation_summary.behaviors: Behaviors are accurately described and traceable to the documentation. No hallucinated or missing entries.

findings.description: More detailed descriptions of the data exchanged in each data flow are needed for better clarity and verification.
The glossary mentions several tokens (e.g., ETH, stgUSDC, BYUSD, pyUSD) that are not included in the assets list.

Several components mentioned in the documentation (e.g., Airdrop Checker, Airdrop Claim, HoneySwap, BEX, Berachain Bridge, BeraScan Block Explorer, OpenZeppelin, Berachain Discord, Governance Forum, BGT IncentiveDistributor, FeeCollector) are not explicitly listed in the components section.
Data flows related to the HoneySwap, BEX, and Berachain Bridge are missing.
Data flows related to governance proposals and their lifecycle are missing.
Data flows related to Incentive Token distribution and claiming are missing.
Data flows related to fee collection and distribution are missing.
